details: The agent ran the correct sequence of commands (get pods, describe pod, get pvc, describe pvc, get storageclass) and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending -> because PVC data-cache is unbound -> because StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' exists). The root cause was correctly identified with evidence from the actual cluster commands.
